page_metadata.biotools__summary: Output reads with low quality bases trimmed (at the extremities) or masked and/or with quality descreased to the minimum. Output an extra singlet dataset if paired-end data provided.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Output reads with low quality bases trimmed (at the extremities) or masked and/or with quality descreased to the minimum. Output an extra singlet dataset if paired-end data provided.
